type.name: vote
type.label: Simple Majority Vote
type.description: A vote allows any user in the source organ to vote on proposals to add, edit or replace one or many entries, assets or procedures in the target organ.

fields.name: voteDuration
fields.label: Vote duration
fields.description: Duration of the vote phase, as a number of blocks.

type.name: erc20Vote
type.label: Token-weighted Vote
type.description: A token vote allows any user in the source organ to vote on proposals, where its voting power is based on the amount of tokens it holds.
